# 🤖 Cyberpunk Dynamic Weather App

A visually stunning, futuristic web application that tracks real-time weather data with dynamic neon effects and interactive custom animations tailored to current weather conditions.

## 🚀 Live Demo
> **[View Live Project](https://github.io)** *(Укажите вашу ссылку GitHub Pages)*

## ✨ Key Features
- **Real-Time Data**: Fetches accurate global weather condition parameters using the OpenWeatherMap API.
- **Cyberpunk UI Aesthetic**: Fully responsive, translucent glassmorphism layout with neon-illuminated accents.
- **Dynamic Adaptive Effects**: 
  - ☀️ **Clear Sky**: Renders a glowing neon solar element accompanied by a smooth rainbow fade animation.
  - ☁️ **Clouds**: Displays a soft, blurred neon cloud element with dual purple-blue shadow casting.
  - 🌧️ **Rain & Drizzle**: Generates 50 standalone responsive rain drops traveling dynamically with varying physics.
  - ⚡ **Thunderstorm**: Implements a chaotic backdrop brightness filter loop to simulate high-voltage lightning strikes.
  - ❄️ **Snowfall**: Spawns customized luminous geometric snowflakes floating down at micro-gravity speeds.
  - 🌪️ **Tornado & Fog**: Smoothly transitions backgrounds to localized smog levels using intense blur overlays.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **HTML5** & **CSS3** (Advanced Keyframe Animations & Filters)
- **TypeScript** (Typed State Logic & Async Fetch Control)
- **OpenWeatherMap API** (External JSON Data Resource Integration)

## 📦 Local Setup & Installation
1. Clone this repository to your desktop machine:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/SiuzannaVach/neon-weather-app.git
   ```
2. Compile the updated TypeScript source configuration layout to JavaScript:
   ```bash
   npx tsc app.ts
   ```
3. Run the live browser application deployment using any web server extension (e.g., Live Server in VS Code).
